name: Kerrigan
description: A combo Assassin who goes all in, diving into the enemy team.
title: Queen of Blades
info: Once a terran ghost with formidable psionic abilities, Sarah Kerrigan was betrayed by her allies and transformed into the Queen of Blades. Now freed of the dark one's corruption, Kerrigan faces a threat that could destroy the galaxy itself.

Kerrigan.name: Ravage
Kerrigan.description: Leap to a target, dealing 115 (+4% per level) damage. If the enemy dies within 0.75 seconds, restore 1 charge and refund 20 Mana.  Quest: Kill enemies within a short distance of Kerrigan. Minions grant 1 stack and Heroes grant 7 stacks.  Reward: After reaching 100 stacks, Ravage deals 125 additional damage and Hero kills now provide 14 stacks.  Mythic Reward: After reaching a 250 stacks, Ravage deals a further 200 additional damage.

Kerrigan.name: Impaling Blades
Kerrigan.description: After 1.25 seconds, deal 150 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within the target area, Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.

Kerrigan.name: Primal Grasp
Kerrigan.description: Pulls enemies within the target area towards Kerrigan, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage. After 2.5 seconds, an explosion occurs around Kerrigan, dealing 160 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.

Kerrigan.name: Summon Ultralisk
Kerrigan.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.

Kerrigan.name: Maelstrom
Kerrigan.description: Deals 74 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.

Kerrigan.name: Assimilation
Kerrigan.description: Gain 10% of damage dealt from Abilities and 20% from Basic Attacks as Shields for 6 seconds. Shield amount gained doubled against Heroes.  Current maximum: 1004 (+4% per level)

1.name: Siphoning Impact
1.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants 100 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields.

1.name: Assimilation Mastery
1.description: Regeneration Globe healing grants 50 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by 150%.

1.name: Fury of the Swarm
1.description: After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds splashes for 100% damage around the target.

4.name: Ravaging Ferocity
4.description: Ravage grants Kerrigan 25% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

4.name: Kinetic Fulmination
4.description: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within 10 seconds by 10%, up to 100%.

4.name: Psionic Pulse
4.description: Primal Grasp explodes a second time 2 seconds after its first explosion.

7.name: Queen of Blades
7.description: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by 4 seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 100%.

7.name: Boundless Fury
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every 12 seconds per Hero.

7.name: Bladed Momentum
7.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by 0.75 seconds.

10.name: Maelstrom
10.description: Deals 74 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.

10.name: Summon Ultralisk
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.

13.name: Psionic Barrier
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants 20 Spell Armor and 4% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20% Movement Speed.

13.name: Volatile Power
13.description: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by 10%, but reduce duration of Assimilation by 3 seconds.

13.name: Chrysalis
13.description: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 650 (+4% per level) Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 4% of her maximum Health per second.  Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.

16.name: Mounting Potency
16.description: Ravage grants 5% Spell Power for 5 seconds, up to 40%.

16.name: Painful Spikes
16.description: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional 60 (+4% per level) damage the next 6 times Kerrigan damages them within 5 seconds.

16.name: Unbridled Energy
16.description: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants 35% Spell Power for 4 seconds.

20.name: Omegastorm
20.description: Maelstrom's duration is increased by 0.4 seconds every time it damages a Hero.

20.name: Torrasque
20.description: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by 20%. The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within 4 seconds, a new Ultralisk is born.

20.name: Assimilation Blades
20.description: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by 2% for 5 seconds, up to 40%.

20.name: Psionic Shift
20.description: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.

tooltipMarkup.KerriganAssimilation: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganAbilityDamageParent,LeechFraction[Shields]*100"/>%</c> of damage dealt from Abilities and <c val="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> from Basic Attacks as Shields for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganAssimilationShield,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. Shield amount gained doubled against Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Current maximum: <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganAssimilationShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit"/></c></c>
tooltipMarkup.KerriganAssimilationBlades: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,KerriganAssimilationBladesDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganAssimilationBladesDurationController,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,KerriganAssimilationBladesDamageAccumulator,Scale*Behavior,KerriganAssimilationBladesTokenCounter,Max*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganAssimilationFuryOfTheSwarmTalent: After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganAssimilationFuryOfTheSwarmCarryBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds splashes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganWeaponFuryOfTheSwarmDamage,Amount/Effect,KerriganWeaponDamage,Amount*100"/>%</c> damage around the target.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganAssimilationMasteryTalent: Regeneration Globe healing grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganAssimilationAssimilationMasteryCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Talent,KerriganAssimilationMastery,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganAssimilationVolatilePower: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganAbilityDamageParent,LeechFlatModifierArray[VolatilePower].Modifier*100"/>%</c>, but reduce duration of Assimilation by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganAssimilationShield,Duration+Talent,KerriganAssimilationVolatilePower,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganBladedMomentum: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganBladedMomentumModifyCooldowns,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse*(-1)" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganChrysalis: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,KerriganChrysalis,LifeMax"/></c> Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganChrysalisTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(1/Behavior,KerriganChrysalisStasis,Period)*Effect,KerriganChrysalisCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100"/>%</c> of her maximum Health per second.<n/><n/>Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganImpalingBlades: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganImpalingBladesDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies within the target area, Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganImpalingBlades,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganImpalingBladesKineticFulmination: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganImpalingBladesKineticFulminationCarry,Duration"/></c> seconds by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,KerriganImpalingBladesKineticFulminationDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c>, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,KerriganImpalingBladesKineticFulminationDamageAccumulator,Scale*100*Behavior,KerriganImpalingBladesKineticFulminationTokenCounter,Max"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganImpalingBladesPainfulSpikes: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganImpalingBladesPainfulSpikesDamage,Amount"/></c> damage the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganImpalingBladesPainfulSpikesStacks,MaxStackCount"/></c> times Kerrigan damages them within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganImpalingBladesPainfulSpikesStacks,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganMaelstrom: Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganMaelstromDamage,Amount*2"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganMaelstrom,Duration" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganMaelstromOmegastormTalent: Maelstrom's duration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganMaelstromOmegastormIncreaseMaelstromDuration,Value" precision="4"/></c> seconds every time it damages a Hero.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganPrimalGrasp: Pulls enemies within the target area towards Kerrigan, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganPrimalGraspPullDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspExplosion,Duration" precision="1" player="0"/></c> seconds, an explosion occurs around Kerrigan, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganPrimalGraspExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrier: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrierSpellArmor,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrierMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrierMovementSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrierMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrierMovementSpeedBuff,MaxStackCount"/>%</c> Movement Speed.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicPulse: Primal Grasp explodes a second time <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicPulseExplosion,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds after its first explosion.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganPsionicShift: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganPsionicShiftDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies. Generates <c val="#TooltipNumbers">300%</c> increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganRavage: Leap to a target, dealing damage. If the enemy dies within seconds, restore charge and refund Mana.Quest: Kill enemies within a short distance of Kerrigan. Minions grant stack and Heroes grant stacks. Reward: After reaching stacks, Ravage deals additional damage and Hero kills now provide stacks.Mythic Reward: After reaching a stacks, Ravage deals a further additional damage.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganRavageBoundlessFury: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganRavageBoundlessFuryCarryBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds per Hero.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganRavageMountingPotency: Ravage grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganRavageMountingPotencySpellPowerBehavior,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(100)"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganRavageMountingPotencySpellPowerBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganRavageMountingPotencySpellPowerBehavior,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(100)*Behavior,KerriganRavageMountingPotencySpellPowerBehavior,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganRavageQueenOfBlades: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,KerriganRavageQueenOfBlades,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,KerriganRavageDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[QueenOfBlades].Modifier"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganRavageRavagingFerocity: Ravage grants Kerrigan <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganRavagingFerocity,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganRavagingFerocity,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganRavageSiphoningImpact: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganRavageSiphoningImpactCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> points of Assimilation Shields.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganSummonUltralisk: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,KerriganUltraliskCharge,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganUltraliskChargeDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganUltraliskStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,KerriganUltraliskWeaponSplashDamage,Amount/Effect,KerriganUltraliskWeaponDamage,Amount*100"/>%</c> of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganSummonUltraliskTorrasqueTalent: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,KerriganSummonUltraliskTorrasqueBonusHealthBehavior,Modification.VitalRegenMultiplier[Life]"/>%</c>. The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganUltraliskTorrasqueEggTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds, a new Ultralisk is born.
tooltipMarkup.KerriganUnbridledEnergy: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganUnbridledEnergyIncreasedDamage,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*(100)"/>%</c> Spell Power for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,KerriganUnbridledEnergyIncreasedDamage,Duration"/></c> seconds.
